archive_data.question_text: The sale of car results in __________.

options.text: decrease in sale of final products

explanation.english: Sale of a car represents the transaction of a final good. GDP measures the market value of all final goods and services produced within the country. Therefore, the sale of a car increases GDP.
explanation.tanglish: Oru car vikravu oru muduporul vagaipadhai kattupidikindradhu. GDP endrathu oru naattil utpannikkappadum anaithu mudupporul matrum sevaiyin matket pazhaiya aalaikkum. Adhanal car vikravu GDP velaiyai athigarithum.

archive_data.question_text: As of October 2022, fire altars are primarily found in which of the following Harappan cities?

explanation.english: Kalibangan is particularly known for its unique fire altars and ploughed fields, which are distinctive features discovered at this site of the Harappan civilization.
explanation.tanglish: Kalibangan nagaaram, adharkku uriya eri balipeedangal matrum nirayeriya nilangal patri pugazh peyyuginradhu. Ivai harappa nagaarigalil kanudhakka Sirappu amsaangal.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following will NOT be included in the estimation of national income? (i) Expenses on electricity by a factory (ii) Financial help to earthquake victims (iii) Imputed value of production for self-consumption (iv) Brokerage on sale of bonds

explanation.english: Expenses on electricity by a factory are intermediate consumption and excluded from national income. Financial help to earthquake victims is a transfer payment, not representing production. Imputed value of production for self-consumption and brokerage on sale of bonds are included in national income estimation.
explanation.tanglish: Thozhilalayathin minviyach selavu madhdhiya vaganam, adhanal National Income vil serkappadadhu. Bhoomikampathin aalumikalukku kudukkum sinethana mudhalghal oru maruvari selavu, adhu velaiyagadhai paduthudhal illai. Thaan padukkai porulukkaana anithanai padai matrum bond vikravukku kudukkum commission National Income kadasiyil serkappadum.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following is the hardest mineral?

explanation.english: Diamond is the hardest known natural mineral with a Mohs hardness scale rating of 10, making it harder than Gypsum, Talc, and Calcite.
explanation.tanglish: Vairam edhaiyum vittu valiya Sirappamana varkalagagamana isaiyudan (Mohs scale 10) sila. Adhanal adhu Gypsum, Talc matrum Calcite vittum sirappamana maniyagam.

archive_data.question_text: In which year was the city of Agra founded?

explanation.english: The city of Agra was founded in 1504 by Sultan Sikandar Lodi of the Delhi Sultanate.
explanation.tanglish: Agra nagaram Delhi padaiyapurathin Sultan Sikandar Lodi alavargalal 1504 am aandil thondaiyadharku utpattadhu.
